---
title: "The Archive"
subtitle: "Primary sources from the founding of the intersex movement"
description: >
  A cataloged collection of documents from the founding of the Intersex Society of
  North America and the modern intersex movement: newsletters, correspondence,
  photographs, artwork, and early digital materials, assembled by founder Bo Laurent.
open-graph:
  image: /images/social-card-bo.png
  image-width: 1200
  image-height: 630
twitter-card:
  card-style: summary_large_image
  image: /images/social-card-bo.png
listing:
  id: items
  contents: "archive/*/index.qmd"     # each published item folder (e.g. hwa-01/index.qmd)
  type: table
  sort: "date"                # chronological — a collection reads forward in time
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true            # scholars can filter by medium/theme
  fields: [date, title, description]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date"
    title: "Item"
    description: "Description"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <style>
          body.category-active #title-block-header,
          body.category-active #archive-intro { display: none; }
        </style>
        <script>
        (function () {
          const isFiltered = () => /(^|[#&])category=./.test(location.hash);
          const sync = () =>
            document.body.classList.toggle("category-active", isFiltered());
          sync();                                   // catch a bookmarked filtered URL
          window.addEventListener("hashchange", sync);
          // Quarto can clear the hash without firing hashchange (toggling a
          // category off), so re-check after any click in the category widget.
          document.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            if (e.target.closest(".quarto-listing-category")) setTimeout(sync, 0);
          });
        })();
        </script>
---


::: {#archive-intro}
This archive documents the founding years of the modern intersex movement through its
own records. The materials were created and gathered by **Bo Laurent** (who published
much of this work under the name Cheryl Chase, and grew up under the name Bonnie Sullivan), founder of the Intersex Society of
North America. Each item is cataloged, dated, and presented three ways: an editorial
headnote placing it in context, a full transcription, and the original document.

## Scope and content

The collection includes the *Hermaphrodites with Attitude(s)* newsletters, founding
correspondence with journalists, scientists, and historians, photographs, artwork,
and early databases and website captures. Together they trace how a scattered
correspondence network became an organized movement with a public voice.

New items are added as they are prepared and cleared for publication. Items still under
review — including correspondence that requires a privacy review — are not listed here.
:::

## Items

::: {#items}
:::

## Arrangement and use

Items are cataloged individually and can be browsed above by date or filtered by theme.
Each item carries a stable identifier (for example, `hwa-01`) and a stable URL; sections
within an item are separately linkable for citation.

## Provenance

Assembled and held by Bo Laurent. The collection is mixed: **physical materials are held
in the [Kinsey Institute Library's archival collections](https://kinseyinstitute.org/collections/archival/index.html)**,
while born-digital materials — such as the newsletters — are published here. Each item's
page states its own source and holding.

## Rights and reproduction

Rights vary by item and are stated on each item's page. Where a document carries its own
distribution terms — as the newsletters do ("Free to copy and distribute") — those govern.
For permissions, reproduction of restricted materials, or questions about items not yet
published, please [get in touch](mailto:contact@bolaurentpapers.org?subject=Bo%20Laurent%20Papers%20inquiry).

## How to cite

Cite an item by its title, date, and archive identifier — for example:
*Hermaphrodites with Attitudes*, Vol. 1, No. 1 (Winter 1994), ed. Cheryl Chase.
The Bo Laurent Intersex Movement Archive, item `hwa-01`,
https://bolaurentpapers.org/archive/hwa-01/.
For a physical item, add its holding repository (the Kinsey Institute Library).
